rationale: The cited paper is used in Study 1 to justify interpreting task completion time as an indicator of decision-process complexity. That role is tied to a central mechanism in the citing article (complexity reduction under CvSS), so the citation helps motivate how key constructs are operationalized rather than serving as a purely generic mention. At the same time, the citing paper does not reuse or extend the cited paper's CAM logit model directly.
relation_description: The citing paper applies the cited paper's complexity-related insight to a new context by using decision time as evidence of customization-process complexity. This supports the citing paper's empirical test of whether CvSS reduces perceived complexity.
